overall.description: Night-time driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077 through a rain-soaked futuristic metropolis. The vehicle navigates neon-lit streets, passes under overpasses, and enters a covered bridge tunnel, with wet asphalt reflecting vibrant holographic advertisements and street lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy commercial intersection with holographic billboards

events.description: traffic light changes from red to green, vehicle accelerates from stop
passing under the first concrete overpass structure

agents.ego_description: waiting at the red light at Broad Street intersection then accelerating through the crosswalk

notable_agents.action: black sedan stopped ahead at the red light, then moving forward
dark sports car parked or moving slowly on the right shoulder

entered.detail: massive holographic advertisement screen displaying animated content on building facade
red illuminated overhead sign with white text reading 'Broad'
suspended traffic signal showing red then changing to green
tall palm trees planted in the center road divider
tall glass building with illuminated windows and neon accents

segments.scene_description: The vehicle waits at a red light at the Broad Street intersection surrounded by towering digital billboards and futuristic architecture. As the light turns green, the car accelerates through the wet crosswalk and passes under a concrete overpass, with palm trees lining the median.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide boulevard with palm tree median and overhead overpasses

events.description: slight curve to the right as the boulevard gently bends
approaching the Skyline North intersection with overhead signage becoming visible

agents.ego_description: cruising steadily down the multi-lane boulevard lined with palm trees and passing under overpasses

notable_agents.action: vehicle with red taillights driving ahead in the distance

entered.detail: large concrete overpass spanning the roadway with thick support pillars
tall floodlight towers with multiple lamps illuminating the road
red overhead gantry sign with white text reading 'Skyline North'

segments.scene_description: The vehicle travels along a wide, rain-slicked boulevard lined with palm trees and passes under massive concrete overpasses. The road curves gently to the right as the vehicle approaches the Skyline North intersection, with tall floodlight towers visible on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: Charter Hill district curved roadway with commercial buildings

events.description: executing a right turn at the Skyline North intersection
entering the Charter Hill area with distinct neighborhood signage

agents.ego_description: navigating a right turn at the intersection and proceeding along the curved road through the Charter Hill district

entered.detail: illuminated building sign reading 'Charter Hill' with directional arrow
tall vertical digital banners displaying advertisements on building facade

segments.scene_description: The vehicle turns right at the Skyline North intersection and enters the Charter Hill district, passing by buildings with vertical advertising banners. The road curves gently through the area with palm trees still visible along the sides.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense commercial district with heavy neon signage and billboards

events.description: passing through an intersection with yellow crosswalk markings
approaching the East Bay Bridge entrance with tunnel ahead

agents.ego_description: navigating through the neon-lit commercial district with frequent intersections and other traffic

notable_agents.action: black SUV passing on the left side of the vehicle

entered.detail: blue overhead sign with white text reading 'East Bay Bridge'
building covered in dense neon signs and holographic advertisements
elevated walkway structure crossing above the roadway

segments.scene_description: The vehicle drives through a dense commercial area saturated with neon signage and holographic billboards. After passing a black SUV on the left, the vehicle approaches the East Bay Bridge entrance, with the blue overhead sign becoming visible against the dark sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered bridge tunnel with concrete barriers and overhead lighting

events.description: entering the enclosed East Bay Bridge tunnel structure
transitioning from neon exterior to artificial tunnel lighting

agents.ego_description: entering the tunnel and driving through the enclosed bridge structure with concrete walls

entered.detail: large concrete tunnel mouth with overhead lighting and dark interior
tall concrete walls with metal railings lining both sides of the road
linear array of bright white lamps mounted on the tunnel ceiling

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters the East Bay Bridge tunnel, transitioning from the open neon-lit streets to an enclosed concrete corridor. The environment becomes darker with only artificial overhead lighting illuminating the wet road as the vehicle proceeds through the tunnel.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive through a rain-soaked futuristic metropolis that transitions from open, neon-lit boulevards into a dark, enclosed tunnel. It begins at a red light at the Broad Street intersection surrounded by towering digital billboards, accelerating through a wet crosswalk and under a concrete overpass lined with palm trees. As the vehicle follows the curve of a wide boulevard toward the Skyline North intersection, the scene shifts into the Charter Hill district, passing vertical advertising banners and floodlight towers. The environment then becomes saturated with dense holographic signage and neon lights before the camera passes a black SUV and approaches the blue overhead sign of the East Bay Bridge. Finally, the open city skyline vanishes as the vehicle enters the bridge tunnel, transitioning into a dark concrete corridor illuminated only by artificial overhead lighting reflecting off the wet road.
